title: ICSI CS Executive & Professional June 2026 Admit Cards Released!
content:
# ICSI CS Executive & Professional June 2026 Admit Cards Released!

Ek important update hai Company Secretaries (CS) ke aspirants ke liye! The Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI) ne CS Executive & Professional June 2026 Examinations ke admit cards release kar diye hain. Yeh announcement May 21, 2026 ko ICSI ki official website par publish kiya gaya tha.

Yahaan kuch key details hain:

*   **Admit Card Release Date:** May 21, 2026.
*   **Download Process:** Candidates apna 17-digit registration number use karke official ICSI website se apna E-Admit Card download kar sakte hain.
*   **Examination Dates:** CS Executive aur CS Professional ke examinations June 1, 2026 se shuru hokar June 7, 2026 tak chalenge.
*   **Important Note:** Admit cards physical form mein send nahi kiye jaayenge. Students ko apna E-Admit Card download aur print karna hoga.
*   **Verification:** Admit card download karne ke baad, sabhi students ko apna Name, Photograph, Signature, Registration Number, Examination Centre, Syllabus, Exemptions, Optional Subject, Medium & Group, aur Date & Time of Examination carefully verify karna chahiye.
*   **Instructions:** Examination mein appear hone se pehle, E-Admit Card ke saath attached 'Instructions to Examinees' ko acche se padh lein.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.icsi.edu/media/webmodules/e-admit_card_june_2026_executive_professional.pdf)

*Published on: 23 May 2026*
